model.requested_alias_note: real-agent-v1 starts with Sonnet 4.6; Haiku 4.5 and gpt-5-mini variants ship as real-agent-v1-haiku.json and real-agent-v1-gpt5mini.json after the Sonnet smoke test passes.

agent_config.tool_surface_note: All four tools are deterministic CPU-bound operations on the case's raw.log. The `grep` tool reuses the static `grep` baseline's regex and before/after window logic, so a method that 'wins' via agent grep is using the same operation as the static grep baseline — making the cost comparison clean. `read_file` is a literal line range read; `tail` is the trailing N lines; `view_log_lines` is read_file with line-number prefix annotation for stack-frame inspection.

provider_policy.non_fatal_provider_error_prefixes_note: Agent variant can hit three additional non-fatal classes beyond the single-shot shim's: (1) tool_use_budget_exhausted when the agent burns max_iterations or max_total_input_tokens before emitting final_diagnosis; (2) runtime_tool_dispatch_error when one of the 4 tools receives malformed args; (3) token_limit_exceeded if a single LLM response would exceed Anthropic's per-turn output cap. All three are documented states, not unexpected provider failures.

cache_key_env_note: Three env vars participate in the cache key: model alias (mirrors real-debugger-v2), and the two agent budget overrides. Bumping either budget invalidates existing cached rows by design — a larger budget should not silently replay a row from a smaller budget.
